ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season/postseason) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss/tie) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team is placed */,
  "team_history" TEXT /* Team history and notable achievements */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Rookie year of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active/inactive/injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the statistics are recorded */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was at bat */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits the player made */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs the player batted in */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs the player hit */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts for the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks for the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases for the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, team rep) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "favorite_teams" TEXT /* List of favorite teams for the user */,
  "favorite_players" TEXT /* List of favorite players for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "coach_position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., manager, pitching coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the umpire has been active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Cy Young) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
